stem: The number of cells in a yeast culture triples every hour. There are 28,000 cells in the culture at the start of an experiment. Which of the following represents the number of cells, y, in the culture t hours after the start of the experiment?
rationale: Choice B is correct. Since the number of cells triples every hour, the relationship between t and y can be represented by an exponential equation of the form y = a(b)t, where a is the initial number of cells and b is the growth factor per hour. The initial value is 28,000 and the growth factor is 3, so y = 28,000(3)t. Choice A swaps the initial value and the growth factor. Choice C multiplies an exponential by the wrong base. Choice D represents an exponential decay.
